description: Codex long-horizon Rust implementation task for a 6502 CPU emulator, verified by locked contract tests and cargo test.
prompt: Implement a complete MOS 6502 CPU emulator in Rust in this workspace. The public API expected by the existing tests is already sketched in src/lib.rs; keep that API stable, do not edit Cargo.toml, Cargo.lock, or tests/cpu6502_contract.rs, and implement the CPU and memory bus behavior in src/lib.rs. Support reset vector loading, status flags, stack behavior, step(), run_until_brk(), and the representative official opcodes and addressing modes needed by the contract tests, while keeping the design extensible enough for a fuller 6502. Run cargo test --locked and only finish after all tests pass. In your final response, briefly summarize the implementation and the verification you ran.
